title: Trimming Shop Chalkboard Photobooth Props for DIY Funny Selfie Photography, Party Favor, Wedding, Prom, Anniversary, Birthday, Event Decoration, 10pcs
features: 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐛𝐨𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐩𝐬: Bring a rustic, playful element to your next celebration with our set of chalkboard photo booth props—a delightful assortment of reusable chalkboard signs ideal for every party. You can pen a humorous quote or anything else on these props with a marker or glitter pen to make them more playful to use.

𝐑𝐞𝐮𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 & 𝐃𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞: Made from cardboard paper, these high-quality photo booth props are incredibly light and reusable. With a combination of chalkboard speech bubbles and thought bubbles, this multi-purpose kit is ideal for taking memories with a touch of humour and style. These chalkboard signs are reusable and simple to wipe clean, making them ideal for use at multiple events.

𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐅𝐮𝐧: Personalise your captions with these printable blank chalkboard photo booth props - perfect for weddings, birthday parties, baby showers, and other celebratory events. They each include a stick for easy holding—awesome for group photos, DIY booth setups, and tabletop centerpieces.

𝐈𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐓𝐡𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐬: Such rustic-themed and vintage-style chalkboard props are ideal for contemporary, classic, or quirky party themes for young and old. From weddings to birthdays and baby showers to holiday parties, these homemade blank signs give you the freedom to be creative with your custom messages.

𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐒𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐞𝐬 & 𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐬: The mini chalkboard photo booth props are available in packs of 10 pieces, featuring varied shapes such as speech and thought bubbles, which allow for multiple photo styling options. It is a creative and playful method to spice up your party selfies and group photos.
description: Product Description What occasions are these photo booth props suitable for? Our props are perfect for all kinds of celebrations—whether it’s a 1st birthday, anniversary, Valentine's Day, wedding, hen party, New Year’s, or any themed event. There's something fun for guests of all ages. Are the props ready to use straight out of the pack? Each set comes with pre-cut props, wooden sticks, and glue dots. Simply peel and stick to assemble—no extra tools needed. Are these photo props suitable for children and adults? Yes! They’re designed for all ages, featuring playful and stylish designs that everyone can enjoy, from toddlers to grandparents. Can these props be reused? Absolutely. Made from thick artboard with high print quality, the props are sturdy enough for multiple uses when handled with care. Will the colours show well in photos? Definitely. Each prop is printed in bold, vibrant colours that pop in pictures—perfect for creating fun, eye-catching memories.
